name: lens-temper
description: LensTemper review workflow skills for structured implementation-plan reviews, validation, synthesis, reruns, and archival evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Structured lens reviews for implementation plans
interface.longDescription: Use LensTemper to run independent lens reviews, validate review artifacts, synthesize findings, decide reruns, and archive final review evidence.
defaultPrompt: Review this implementation plan with LensTemper.
Run a structured lens review for this plan.
